zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien於1200年之前與Kennedy o'brien在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien于1200年之前与Kennedy o'brien在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic   Cinnéidigh   . In recent years it has sometimes been used as a given name in the English-speaking world in honour of the assassinated American president  John F. Kennedy  (  1917–63 ) and his brother  Robert  (  1925–68 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien married Kennedy o'brien before 1200, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien a épousé Kennedy o'brien avant 1200, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien hat vor 1200 in Europa Kennedy o'brien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien lei sposato Kennedy o'brien prima del 1200, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brienは1200年以前にヨーロッパでKennedy o'brienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien(은)는 1200년 이전 우럽에서 Kennedy o'brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien casou-se com Kennedy o'brien antes 1200, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien вышла замуж за человека по имени Kennedy o'brien перед 1200 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Kennedy O'Brien se casó con Kennedy o'brien antes de 1200, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
